_comments.purpose: Main TypeScript configuration for the Drawnix web application
_comments.description: This is a composite configuration that orchestrates app and test configurations
_comments.jsx: Uses React 17+ automatic JSX transform (no need to import React)
_comments.allowJs: Disabled to enforce TypeScript usage for better type safety
_comments.allowSyntheticDefaultImports: Enables default imports from modules without default exports
_comments.strict: Enables all strict type checking options for maximum type safety
_comments.types: Includes Vite client types for import.meta and HMR support
_comments.references: Points to separate configs for application code and test code
_comments.extends: Inherits shared configuration from workspace root tsconfig.base.json
